title: santifer/career-ops
abstract: AI-powered job search system built on Claude Code. 14 skill modes, Go dashboard, PDF generation, batch processing. Automates resume tailoring, job matching, and application tracking.
abstract_zh: 基于Claude Code的AI求职系统！14种技能模式、Go仪表盘、PDF生成、批量处理。自动帮你定制简历、匹配职位、追踪投递进度。找工作这件事，让AI替你搞定。
